name: Iterative.ai
description: MLOps company behind open-source DVC, CML and Studio; now focused on multimodal AI data tooling for video, audio, PDFs and large datasets.

seo.title: Iterative.ai — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: Iterative.ai: MLOps company behind open-source DVC, CML and Studio; now focused on multimodal AI data tooling for video, audio, PDFs and large datasets.

when_to_use: Versioning ML datasets and pipelines with DVC and Git
Running ML experiments with CML in CI/CD pipelines
Managing model registry and artifacts with DVC Studio
Building reproducible ML workflows across distributed teams

pros: Open-source DVC and CML widely adopted
New multimodal tooling fills real gap
cons: Studio commercial product less mature than rivals
Git-centric UX confuses non-engineer data folks
Strategy shifts have created product drift
review.verdict: Great open-source roots; commercial offering still finding its footing in the MLOps market.
review.best_for: Engineering-heavy ML teams that want Git-based data and experiment workflows
review.not_for: Data science teams preferring notebook-first UIs over Git semantics

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
